title: Craftable Painting Variants
description: A data & resource pack that allows you to craft all the painting variants along with giving them individual textures.
body:
**This is a data & resource pack that adds craftable painting variants to the vanilla game along with individual textures!**

![Data pack preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4ba6feab4c7855a245f9fc36e58520b66915161.png)


**For (Version 6) 1.21.5+ the painting textures will now show up in the creative inventory!**
![Photo showing showing that the textures will now show on the creative menu for 1.21.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d25cf702f8bc6bd4c7ff428dedffd69d2080ec.png)








# Recipes
+ Recipes are unlocked when a painting enters the inventory.



+ All the recipes are shapeless.     



**_Examples:_**   
![A screenshot showing a painting crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c732e64814e083731bbd11f2f3a2138bfe0e1431.png)     
![Recipie examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d773dfd4b6dffb407e73170e6f0c43d89c59522.png)










# Compatibility
+ Data Pack Version **1 & 2** only works for **1.20.5** - **1.20.6**
+ Data Pack Version **3** only works for **1.21** - **1.21.1**
+ Data Pack Version **4** only works for **1.21.2** - **1.21.3**
+ Data Pack Version **5** only works for **1.21.4**
+ Data Pack Version **6** only works for **1.21.5** - **1.21.7**
+ Data/resource pack Version **7 & 8** only works for **1.21.8 +**
 
- resource pack version 1 - 4 only works for **1.20.5** - **1.21.3**
- resource pack version 5 only works for **1.21.4**
- resource pack version 6 only works for **1.21.5**




#
